expectations.text: The output is saved to outputs/generated/prd.json.
branchName is derived from the feature title.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Workspace Member Management",
  "branchName": "workspace-member-management",
  "description": "Workspace admins need to manage membership without editing the database directly.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add audit log schema",
      "description": "As a system, I want to store audit logs for membership changes.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Add audit log table to schema",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "schema.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add invite member feature",
      "description": "As an admin, I want to invite members by email.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Backend endpoint to send invite",
        "UI form to input email and send invite",
        "Records to audit log",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "api/invite.ts",
        "components/InviteForm.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Add member role change feature",
      "description": "As an admin, I want to change a member role between viewer, editor, and admin.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Backend endpoint to change role",
        "UI dropdown in member list to select role",
        "Records to audit log",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "api/role.ts",
        "components/MemberList.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Add revoke access feature",
      "description": "As an admin, I want to revoke workspace access.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Backend endpoint to revoke access",
        "UI button in member list to remove user",
        "Records to audit log",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "api/revoke.ts",
        "components/MemberList.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Add audit log review view",
      "description": "As an admin, I want to review recent membership changes in the workspace settings page.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Backend endpoint to fetch audit logs",
        "UI view in settings page to display recent logs",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "api/audit.ts",
        "pages/settings.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover invite, role change, revoke access, and audit-log or audit-view work.
